block.caption: Table 5-1 Attributes of electrostatics and magnetostatics.
block.html:
AttributeElectrostaticsMagnetostatics
SourcesStationary charges $ ho_v$ Steady currents J
Fields and FluxesE and DH and B
Constitutive parameter(s) $\varepsilon$ and $\sigma$ $\mu$
Governing equations
• Differential form $ abla \cdot \mathbf{D} = ho_v$ $ abla imes \mathbf{E} = 0$ $ abla \cdot \mathbf{B} = 0$ $ abla imes \mathbf{H} = \mathbf{J}$
• Integral form $\oint_S \mathbf{D} \cdot d\mathbf{s} = Q$ $\oint_S \mathbf{B} \cdot d\mathbf{s} = 0$
$\oint_C \mathbf{E} \cdot d\mathbf{l} = 0$ $\oint_C \mathbf{H} \cdot d\mathbf{l} = I$
PotentialScalar V, with E = - $ abla V$ Vector A, with B = $ abla imes \mathbf{A}$
Energy density $w_e = rac{1}{2} \varepsilon E^2$ $w_m = rac{1}{2} \mu H^2$
Force on charge q $\mathbf{F_e} = q\mathbf{E}$ $\mathbf{F_m} = q\mathbf{u} imes \mathbf{B}$
Circuit element(s)C and RL
